suppress.notes: The advisory applies to Prometheus server behavior. The matched Maven artifact is Micrometer's registry integration and is not the affected server product. This correction is limited to one package and one CVE and expires for mandatory review.

JetBrains documents CVE-2020-29582 as resolved in Kotlin 1.4.21. The scanned components are fixed Kotlin 1.9.25 standard-library modules. The correction is restricted to the base, JDK7, and JDK8 package names at the exact version and CVE.

GHSA-2c5c-chwr-9hqw affects io.netty:netty-codec-http3 from 4.2.0.Final through 4.2.12.Final. The scanned components are transport modules on the distinct 4.1.135.Final branch. The generic Netty CPE association is corrected only for the exact Java transport, epoll-classes, and native-unix-common package identities and CVE.
